string.name: callkit_request_camera_permission
string.value: Camera permission is required to enable video calls.

string.name: callkit_request_microphone_permission
string.value: Microphone permission is required to enable audio calls.

string.name: TUICallKit_inviteToVideoCall
string.value: invites you to a video call

string.name: TUICallKit_inviteToAudioCall
string.value: invites you to an audio call

string.name: TUICallKit_waitAccept
string.value: Waiting for the other party to accept

string.name: TUICallKit_Group_inviteToGroupCall
string.value: invites you to a group call

string.name: TUICallKit_lineBusy
string.value: The other party is busy. Please try again later.

string.name: TUICallKit_otherPartyReject
string.value: The other party declined the call

string.name: TUICallKit_otherPartyNoResponse
string.value: No response. Please try again later.

string.name: TUICallKit_otherPartyCanceled
string.value: The other party canceled the call

string.name: TUICallKit_youHaveMissedCalls
string.value: You are already in a call. Cannot start another.

string.name: TUICallKit_User_Exceed_Limit
string.value: Up to 9 people are supported in a single call

string.name: TUICallKit_FailedToGetCameraPermission_Tips
string.value: Camera permission not enabled, unable to start video call. Go to Settings > %s to enable camera permission

string.name: TUICallKit_FailedToGetMicrophonePermission_Tips
string.value: Microphone permission not enabled, unable to start audio/video call. Go to Settings > %s to enable microphone permission

string.name: TUICallKit_deviceNotSupportEarpiece
string.value: This device does not support earpiece playback

string.name: TUICallKit_OtherParty_NetworkLowQuality
string.value: The other party's network is poor

string.name: TUICallKit_SmartCellular_description
string.value: We detected that your Wi-Fi connection is poor. Switch to cellular for a better experience.

string.name: TUICallKit_enterPipModeFailHint
string.value: Failed to enter Picture-in-Picture mode, please check if the permission is enabled.
